scripts.build:commit: npm run build && git add docs/assets/app.js docs/sw.js docs/cache-buster.js docs/index.html sw.js src/ui/main.ts && git commit -m "build: update app.js and service worker cache version"
scripts.push:main: git pull --rebase origin main && git push origin main --force-with-lease
scripts.sync: npm run build:commit && npm run push:main
